title: lilium monadelphum subsp. armenum
intro: Lilium monadelphum subsp. armenum is a rare and lesser-known species of lily, known as Armenian lily, belonging to the Liliaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Lilium monadelphum subsp. armenum include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant's flowers and bulbs are used to create infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed as a tea, capsule, or topical application.
